title: FreshBooks MCP Server
description: Production-grade MCP server for FreshBooks with 25 tools for invoices, clients, expenses, payments, time tracking, projects, estimates, and reports.

freshbooksClientId.title: Client ID
freshbooksClientId.description: FreshBooks OAuth2 application Client ID. Create an app at https://my.freshbooks.com/#/developer

freshbooksRedirectUri.title: Redirect URI
freshbooksRedirectUri.description: OAuth2 redirect URI configured in your FreshBooks app.
